name: tools_only_used
description: Demonstrates only_used_tools. Whitelists the set of tools the agent is allowed to call - any tool outside the list fails the check. Useful for narrowly-scoped read-only tasks.

turns.message: Read the file README.md in the current directory and reply with the first heading line (the line that starts with '# '). Do not run any shell commands. Do not search - just open the file directly.
